Convert c_afm to Numpy matrix.

Convert c_afm to something sane.

getDateTime()[source]#
get_img_dim(scale_data)[source]#

Get image dimensions (height and width) from scale data.

Return a list of PyReconstruct-formatted transformations.

transforms_as_strings(recon_transforms, output_file=None)[source]#

Return transform matrices as string.

modules.backend.func.import_transforms module#

getDateTime()[source]#
importTransforms(series: Series, tforms_fp: str, series_states=None, log_event=True)[source]#

Import transforms from a text file.

Params:

series (Series): the series to import transforms to tforms_fp (str): the file path for the transforms file series_states (SereisStates): series states object from GUI

modules.backend.func.scan_zarr module#

class ZarrScanner(zarr_fp: str)[source]#

Bases: object

addZarrayFile(group_name: str, file_str: str)[source]#

Keep track of number of specific zarray files.

Params:

group_name (str): the name of the group containing the zarray file file_str (str): the .zarray file in string format

rectifyZarr()[source]#

Correct the internal files in the zarr.

scanFolder(folder: str)[source]#

San a folder within a zarr file for missing and corrupt files

Params:

folder (str): the folder to scan

removeEmptyFolders(folder)[source]#

Remove empty folders within a folder.

Params:

folder (str): the parent folder.

modules.backend.func.state_manager module#

class FieldState(contours: dict, ztraces: dict, tforms: dict, flags: list, contours_fp: str = None, updated_contours=None, updated_ztraces=None)[source]#

Bases: object

copy()[source]#
getContours()[source]#
getFlags()[source]#
getModifiedContours()[source]#
getModifiedZtraces()[source]#
getTforms()[source]#
getZtraces()[source]#
class SectionStates(section: Section = None, series: Series = None)[source]#

Bases: object

addState(section: Section, series: Series)[source]#

Add a new undo state (called when an action is performed.

Params:

section (Section): the section object

initialize(section: Section, series: Series)[source]#

Create the section state manager.

Params:

section (Section): the section object to store states for series (Series): the series that contains the sections

redoState(section: Section, series: Series) → set[source]#

Restore a redo state on the section.

Params:

section (Section): the section to restore

Returns:

(set): the names of modified contours

undoState(section: Section, series: Series) → set[source]#

Restore an undo state on the section.

Params:

section (Section): the section to restore series (Series): the series with ztraces to restore

Returns:

(set): the names of modified contours

class SeriesState(breakable=True)[source]#

Bases: object

applySeriesAttributes(series: Series)[source]#

Apply the stored series attributes to a series.

Params:

series (Series): the series to apply attributes to

getSeriesAttributes()[source]#

Reset the stored series attributes.

Params:

series (Series): the series to store attributes for

resetSeriesAttributes(series: Series)[source]#

Reset the stored series attributes.

Params:

series (Series): the series to store attributes for

class SeriesStates(series: Series)[source]#

Bases: object

addSectionUndo(snum: int)[source]#

Flag the section’s latest undo state as part of the most recent series undo.

Params:

snum (int): the section number

addState(breakable=True)[source]#

Create a new series undo state.

Params:

breakable (bool): True if series state can be broken (aka dissolved and left as individual section events)

canUndo(current_section: int = None, redo=False)[source]#

Checks if an undo is possible.

Params:

current_section (int): the section the user is on

Returns:

(3D undo possible, 2D undo possible, 3D and 2D undo are linked)

checkOverwrite(snum: int)[source]#

Check if a series undo/redo should be removed.

(Called after a state has just been written to the given section)

Params:

snum (int): the section number to check

clear()[source]#

Clear all state tracking.

undoSection(section: Section, redo=False)[source]#

Undo/redo on a section

Params:

section (Section): the section to undo/redo on redo (bool): True if redo, False if undo

undoState(redo=False)[source]#

Perform a series-wide undo or redo.

Params:

redo (bool): True if redo should be performed instead of undo

alignmentPreferencesChanged(pre_series_attrs, post_series_attrs)[source]#

Check if the alignment preferences for objects and ztraces has changed.

getAlignment(attrs, name)[source]#
restoreZtraceOnSection(orig_ztrace: Ztrace, new_ztrace: Ztrace, snum: int) → Ztrace[source]#

Restore the ztrace for a specific section.

Params:

orig_ztrace (Ztrace): the ztrace to be modified new_ztrace (Ztrace): the ztrace with data to be imported snum (int): the section number

Returns:

(Ztrace): the newly formed ztrace

getReconcropperData(json_fp)[source]#

Convert a series in JSON to XML.

original_series (Series): the series to convert new_dir (str): the directory to store the new files

sectionJSONtoXML(series: Series, section: Section, new_dir: str)[source]#

seriesJSONtoXML(series: Series, new_dir: str)[source]#
seriesXMLToJSON(series_fp, section_fps, hidden_dir)[source]#

xml_dir (str): the directory for the xml series
